author: claude
content:
PREMISE VERDICT: NO-OP (like #53). Recommend closing as not-reproducible-via-this-vector.

Empirically verified via direct-selenium repro (FF151 headless + geckodriver, the real getStackTrace/getOriginatingScriptContext/instrumentFunction logic from js-instruments.ts injected as inline <script> text exactly like content-scope.ts::insertScript does, instrumenting window.atob, called from page code incl. the mid-stack deepA->deepB->atob case #54 worries about).

The recorded call_stack contains ZERO moz-extension:// frames in every case. Because the legacy instrument runs as an inline DOM-inserted <script> in the PAGE world, ALL its frames -- including the instrument's own getStackTrace/getOriginatingScriptContext/wrapper frames -- are attributed to the PAGE document URL, not moz-extension://. Example captured call_stack (http page): 'deepB@http://127.0.0.1:8731/page.html:8:35 / deepA@...:7:28 / window.__run@...:9:3'. trace.slice(3) already drops exactly the 3 instrument frames, and even pre-slice the raw stack has no extension origin. Stealth's filterExtensionFrames would have nothing to strip -- same no-op as #53. Mid-stack re-entry tested explicitly; still page-only.

Full analysis + quoted stacks: datadir/verify-54-premise.md
